import{io}from'socket.io-client';const SOCKET_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_SOCKET_URL||'http://localhost:5000';const socket=io(SOCKET_URL,{autoConnect:false,timeout:20000,reconnection:true,reconnectionAttempts:5,reconnectionDelay:1000});// Add connection event listeners for debugging
socket.on('connect',()=>{console.log('✅ Socket connected successfully');});socket.on('connect_error',error=>{console.error('❌ Socket connection error:',error);});socket.on('disconnect',reason=>{console.log('🔌 Socket disconnected:',reason);});export default socket;
